title: aster celtibericus
intro: Aster celtibericus, also known as the Spanish aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Aster celtibericus include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Aster celtibericus can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat gastrointestinal disorders and other health conditions.
